target.name: DISCHARGE_TRANSFER_SEMANTIC_INVARIANCE
target.statement: forall w nf, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> selected_domain(nf) -> terminal_T(nf) -> represents_terminal(nf,w) -> discharge_semantics_selected(nf) = discharge_semantics_unrestricted(w)

weakest_missing_object.name: DISCHARGE_TRANSFER_SEMANTIC_INVARIANCE
weakest_missing_object.statement: represents_terminal(nf,w) preserves discharge semantics from selected-domain terminal witnesses to unrestricted terminal witnesses
